# Daily Report — 2026-06-22

## Task Completed
Added `list_change_schedules` tool targeting the `cmn_schedule` table. Supports optional
filters for schedule type (e.g. `change_window`), name substring (LIKE match), active
state, and time zone. Returns a paginated list with `has_more` / `next_offset` fields.
Registered in `change_coordinator` and `full` packages.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1772
- Coverage: 92%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Clean — pip-audit found no vulnerabilities in auditable packages.

## Files Changed
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/change_tools.py` — added `ListChangeSchedulesParams`, `_format_change_schedule`, `list_change_schedules`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py` — exported `list_change_schedules`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — imported params + function, registered tool entry
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — added to `change_coordinator` and `full` packages
- `tests/test_list_change_schedules.py` — 24 new tests (format, filters, pagination, errors)

## Next Up
Backlog is now empty — time to seed new improvements. Candidate: add `get_change_schedule`
tool (GET cmn_schedule/{sys_id} with 404 guard) to complement `list_change_schedules`.
